mission.title: hami: Failing readiness probe on 2.8.0 when replicas>1
mission.description: Failing readiness probe on 2.8.0 when replicas>1. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify hami troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your hami deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n hami -l app.kubernetes.io/name=hami
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=hami -n hami --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review hami configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant hami configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n hami -l app.kubernetes.io/name=hami
kubectl get configmap -n hami -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=hami
```
**What happened**:
After upgrading from `2.7.1` to `2.8.0` readiness probe is failing on 2 of 3 replicas of `hami-scheduler/vgpu-scheduler-extender`. Looks that only currently elected master is green, rest is yellow.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Failing readiness probe on 2.8.0 when replicas>1
steps.description:
As described in #1617, the PR #1553 brings the readinessProbe check for vgpu-scheduler-extender container in hami-scheduler Pod, however it the current implementation don't work well with the rolling update strategy of deployment.

So in this PR, A new label is introduced to make sure that only the
```yaml
scheduler:
  replicas: 3
  leaderElect: true
```

steps.title: Confirm Failing readiness probe on 2.8.0 when replicas>1 is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=hami -n hami --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n hami --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
As described in #1617, the PR #1553 brings the readinessProbe check for vgpu-scheduler-extender container in hami-scheduler Pod, however it the current implementation don't work well with the rolling update strategy of deployment.

So in this PR, A new label is introduced to make sure that only the leader is selected by the service
I used kimi-cli to generate the testing code

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with hami installed or the issue environment reproducible.
